comment:
## Re-opened by Layer 3 Galileo recheck (2026-05-18)

The May 15-16 fix did **not** fully eliminate this pattern. In the 48h recheck window (2026-05-16 14:00 UTC → 2026-05-18 14:39 UTC), Galileo found **3 of 20 FB/IG in-app browser sessions** still hit silent add-to-cart failure — cart stayed at 0 with no network request and no console error.

Galileo chatID: `019e3b85-53f0-796c-891b-224fba2ccd28`
Recheck disposition: [UNC-1125](/UNC/issues/UNC-1125)

Representative sessions:
- https://app.logrocket.com/mk3nrx/uncle_mays/s/6-019e3264-2f6d-72eb-99da-3b5d890b97cd/0?t=1778961890714 (Instagram browser, Asparagus + Kale)
- https://app.logrocket.com/mk3nrx/uncle_mays/s/6-019e31e0-c5fe-7dc5-8fb0-b228449106ca/0?t=1778953298731 (Instagram, Asparagus + Potatoes)
- https://app.logrocket.com/mk3nrx/uncle_mays/s/6-019e31e3-3efe-78de-bba8-fddf0d0e7674/0?t=1778953443435

Several other FB/IG sessions succeeded in the same window, so the bug is intermittent — likely version- or device-specific. Next iteration needs to:
1. Reproduce on a real FB/IG in-app browser (DevTools UA spoof is NOT sufficient — per CLAUDE.md reality-check rule).
2. Add LogRocket instrumentation around the click handler so we can distinguish silent fail vs. user just not pressing the right element.
3. Ship a verified fix and run another Layer 3 recheck.
